name: graphrag-core
description: AI CRM — Bun + Supabase + Neo4j + Mastra + LiveKit

scripts.clean: bun --eval "const fs = require('fs'); ['packages/ai-core/dist', 'tsconfig.tsbuildinfo', 'packages/ai-core/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo'].forEach(p => { try { fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }) } catch {} })"
scripts.validate: echo 'Validate pipeline — run after implementation is complete.'
scripts.dev:web: echo 'UI dashboard — run after Task 12 is complete.'
scripts.build:web: echo 'UI dashboard build — run after Task 12 is complete.'
